title: Terminal 1 — Domestic Departures
content: Terminal 1 handles domestic departures. Gates A1 through A30. Check-in counters: Rows A through D on Level 2. IndiGo at Row B (Counters B1-B15), Air India at Row C (Counters C1-C10), SpiceJet at Row A (Counters A1-A8), Vistara at Row D (Counters D1-D8). Self-service kiosks near entrance. Security checkpoint at centre of Level 2. Food court on Level 2 centre. Domestic arrivals on Level 0 with baggage carousels 1-8.

title: Terminal 2 — Domestic and Regional
content: Terminal 2 handles domestic and regional flights. Gates B1 through B25. Check-in counters: Rows E through G on Level 2. GoAir at Row E, AirAsia India at Row F. Budget carriers primarily operate from this terminal. Connected to Terminal 1 via walkway on Level 2 (5-minute walk) and free inter-terminal shuttle from Level 0 (runs every 10 minutes). Food court smaller than Terminal 1 but has Haldiram's and McDonald's.

title: Terminal 3 — International Departures
content: Terminal 3 handles international departures and arrivals. Gates C1 through C30, Gates D1 through D20, Gates E1 through E15. Check-in counters: Rows F through K. Emirates at Row F (F1-F12), Singapore Airlines at Row G, Lufthansa at Row H, British Airways at Row I. Duty-free shopping zone between Gates C1-C15. Immigration and passport control between check-in and gates. Transfer security for connecting passengers. Allow 3 hours before international flights.

title: Inter-Terminal Transfer
content: Transfer between terminals: Inter-terminal shuttle train on Level 1, runs every 3-5 minutes, journey takes 5 minutes between terminals. Free for all passengers. Sky bridge on Level 2 connects Terminal 1 and 2 (5-minute walk). For Terminal 3, shuttle is recommended. Transfer security lane available for connecting passengers (typically faster than regular security). Allow 45-60 minutes for international-to-domestic connections.

title: Terminal 1 Gate Locations (A1-A30)
content: Terminal 1 Gates: A1-A10 near security exit (2-5 min walk from check-in). A11-A20 central concourse (5-8 min walk). A21-A30 far end of terminal (8-12 min walk, moving walkway available from A18). Nearest amenities per section: A1-A10 has Starbucks, charging, restrooms. A11-A20 has food court, prayer room near A15, charging. A21-A30 has Costa Coffee, restrooms near A25, charging stations.

title: Terminal 2 Gate Locations (B1-B25)
content: Terminal 2 Gates: B1-B10 near security exit (2-4 min walk). B11-B20 mid-concourse (5-7 min walk). B21-B25 far end (7-10 min walk). Nearest amenities: B1-B10 has WHSmith, restrooms, charging. B8 has Costa Coffee. B11-B20 has snack bar, restrooms near B12, Plaza Premium Lounge near B10 on Level 3. B21-B25 has vending machines, restrooms near B20.

title: Terminal 3 Gate Locations (C1-C30, D1-D20, E1-E15)
content: Terminal 3 Gates: C1-C15 near duty-free zone (3-8 min from immigration). C16-C30 far concourse (8-15 min). D1-D20 Concourse D accessed via walkway from C15 (10-15 min total). E1-E15 Concourse E accessed from Concourse D (15-20 min total, moving walkway available). Nearest amenities: C1-C15 has duty-free, Travel Club Lounge near C8, full restaurants. D1-D20 has café, restrooms, charging. E1-E15 has limited dining, restrooms near E10.

title: Airport Level Guide
content: Airport Levels: Level -1 (Basement): Metro/Train station. Level 0 (Ground): Arrivals, baggage claim, taxis, buses, car rental, prepaid taxi counter. Level 1: Inter-terminal shuttle, luggage storage, medical centre, SIM card counters, services. Level 2: Departures, check-in counters, security, gates, food courts, shops, information desks. Level 3: Airline lounges, VIP services, airport offices. Elevators and escalators at all major junctions.
